About Us

Always Fresh.
Always Crabby Good.

Crabby Matty's serves up the best Maryland-style crabs in Selbyville, Delaware. Fresh blue crabs, perfectly seasoned and steamed to perfection — it's the real deal, straight from the shore.

Whether you're craving steamed crabs by the dozen, jumbo shrimp, snow crab legs, or fresh corn on the cob, we've got you covered. Give us a call to check what's fresh today.

Fresh Catch

Straight From The Water

Our Menu

Maryland Favorites

Steamed Crabs

Fresh blue crabs steamed with our signature Maryland-style seasoning. Available by the dozen or half dozen.

Market Price

Snow Crab Legs

Generous portions of sweet, tender snow crab legs. A crowd favorite at every feast.

Market Price

Steamed Shrimp

Jumbo shrimp steamed in Old Bay and served hot with cocktail sauce on the side.

Market Price

Sides & Extras

Fresh corn on the cob, clams, and all the fixings to complete your crab feast.

Varies

Prices vary by season and availability. Call for today's pricing.
